name: loop-spec
description: One skill that builds any spec doc — requirements, architecture, tech spec, threat model, and twelve more. It decides which docs a task needs, aligns on the list, then produces them one at a time.

save_path.title: Document save location
save_path.description: Root folder where the spec skill saves its documents, relative to the project root. Each feature's documents are grouped together in a subfolder named for that feature.
